evals.name: build-navbar
evals.prompt: Create a responsive navbar with a logo, a few links, and a search input using DaisyUI.
evals.expected_output: A responsive navbar using `navbar`, `navbar-start`, `navbar-center`, `navbar-end`, `menu`, and `input`, with mobile-friendly layout behavior.

evals.name: theme-setup
evals.prompt: How do I add the 'dracula' and 'cyberpunk' themes to my DaisyUI config?
evals.expected_output: CSS plugin block showing `@plugin "daisyui" { themes: ... dracula, cyberpunk; }` plus `data-theme` usage for page or section-level theme switching.

evals.name: responsive-drawer
evals.prompt: Show me how to make a responsive drawer with a menu inside using DaisyUI.
evals.expected_output: A drawer layout using `drawer`, `drawer-toggle`, `drawer-content`, `drawer-side`, and `menu` classes.

evals.name: v5-migration-forms
evals.prompt: Please update this daisyUI form to v5: `<input class="input input-bordered" /><input type="file" class="file-input file-input-bordered" />`
evals.expected_output: Migrated classes using `input` and `file-input` without `*-bordered` suffixes, with a short note that these bordered variants were removed in v5.
